hero.description: Focused on AI-assisted development with Claude Code — code generation, agent orchestration, and day-to-day task automation. Stack: React, Node.js, Python, and SQL.

about.paragraph1: I started as an IT Support Technician and, in just over a year, grew into Software Engineer II — through an internship, Software Engineer I, and an internal promotion at GTF.
about.paragraph2: I use Claude Code daily as part of my actual development workflow — generating and reviewing code, orchestrating agents for multi-step tasks, and automating day-to-day scripts. It's not just experimenting, it's how I build.
about.paragraph3: In parallel, I work as a Front-End Developer (React) at devfellowship, which gives me exposure to different stacks and product contexts.
about.paragraph4: I'm currently studying Systems Analysis and Development, and open to Junior/Mid-level Software Engineer opportunities where I can get technical mentorship, grow quickly, and take on increasingly strategic work.

skills.headingAccent: go from idea to shipped code
skills.paragraph: The stack I use day to day to build products from the database to the final interface.

projects.paragraph: Real projects, not just exercises — built to solve an actual problem.

items.name: FrotaON
items.description: A fleet management application built together with one teammate, replacing a manual process with an automated workflow for requests, approvals, and vehicle checks. Web built with React, mobile app with React Native.
items.branding: Also designed the app's visual identity: name, logo, and color palette.

roles.progression: IT Support Apprentice → Software Development Apprentice → Software Engineer I → Software Engineer II
roles.description: Promoted from Software Engineer I to Software Engineer II, taking on greater autonomy to scope and deliver features independently. Co-built FrotaON with one teammate, a logistics application that replaced a manual process with an automated workflow. Built and maintained 8+ APIs and contributed to 10+ BI dashboards over datasets with millions of records, using React, Node.js, Python, and optimized Oracle SQL queries.
Front-end development for web systems, concurrent with my role at GTF.

Led a small software development team, managing project scope, priorities, and delivery for client software projects. Applied Git-based workflows and project management practices in a self-employed/freelance capacity.

contact.paragraph: I'm always open to new projects, ideas, and opportunities. Send a message and I'll get back to you quickly.
